title: Project scaffolding
description: Initialize monorepo (Next.js frontend + Node/Express API), configure TypeScript, ESLint, Prettier, Husky

title: Docker Compose dev stack
description: Postgres, Redis, Qdrant, n8n, Ollama, API server — with schema auto-init

title: Database schema & migrations
description: Implement schema.sql (users, services, orders, quotes, payments, messages, reviews, bots, workflows, audit_logs); set up migration tool

title: Auth — customer registration & login
description: JWT-based auth with email/password, email verification, token rotation

title: Auth — admin login & middleware
description: Admin role check middleware, separate admin auth, session management

title: CI pipeline
description: GitHub Actions: lint, test, build, security scan (Trivy), Docker build & push

title: Service catalog — data model & API
description: CRUD API for services (admin creates/edits), public GET endpoints, category filtering, search

title: Service catalog — storefront UI
description: Webflow-inspired grid layout, service cards, category tabs, responsive design, hero section

title: Service detail page
description: Full service page: description, features, pricing, gallery, reviews, add-ons, order/quote CTA button

title: Order flow — fixed-price checkout
description: Customer selects service + add-ons → Stripe Checkout → order created with status=paid

title: Order flow — quote request
description: Customer submits requirements form + file uploads → order created with status=quote_requested

title: Landing page & navigation
description: Homepage hero, service category showcase, testimonials section, footer, responsive nav

title: Quote system — admin creates quotes
description: Admin views quote requests, creates line-item quotes, sets expiry, sends to customer

title: Quote system — customer accepts & pays
description: Customer views quote, accepts → Stripe invoice generated → payment → order moves to paid

title: Order management — admin dashboard
description: Admin sees all orders by status, filters, search, bulk actions, revenue summary

title: Order management — status updates
description: Admin changes order status (in_progress → in_review → delivered), customer gets notified

title: Delivery system
description: Admin uploads files/links as deliverables per order; customer downloads from portal

title: Client portal — order tracking
description: Customer dashboard: list of orders, status timeline, current status, estimated delivery

title: Messaging system — per-order threads
description: Real-time chat per order between customer and operator; file attachments; read receipts

title: Email notifications
description: Transactional emails: order confirmation, quote received, status updates, delivery ready, review request

title: Revision workflow
description: Customer requests revision (with feedback); operator sees revision queue; revision counter enforced

title: Reviews & ratings
description: Post-completion review flow; public display on service pages; avg rating calculation

title: Stripe webhook handlers
description: Handle payment.succeeded, payment.failed, invoice.paid, refund events; update order/payment status

title: Refund processing
description: Admin initiates refund via dashboard; Stripe refund API; order status updated

title: Bot manager — CRUD & lifecycle
description: Operator-side: create/configure/start/stop/delete bots per client order; sandbox container orchestration

title: Bot sandbox — container orchestration
description: Docker containers with seccomp, cgroups, network egress proxy for running client bots

title: Trading bot — CCXT adapter
description: Exchange connection via CCXT, market data feeds, WebSocket, order submission (paper + live)

title: Trading bot — risk manager
description: Max position, daily loss limit, drawdown circuit breaker, kill-switch, risk check logging

title: Trading bot — backtest engine
description: Historical data loader, strategy replay, performance metrics (Sharpe, drawdown, win rate), report generation

title: Trading bot — consent & legal
description: Trading addendum signing, mandatory paper-trade period, withdrawal-key rejection, legal disclaimers

title: Scraping bot — core engine
description: Playwright headless pool, proxy rotation, rate limiting, robots.txt compliance

title: Scraping bot — PII pipeline
description: NER + regex PII detection, auto-redaction, compliance logging

title: Scraping bot — dedup & normalize
description: Content fingerprinting, fuzzy dedup, schema normalization, JSON/CSV output

title: AI workflow engine — DAG runner
description: Topological sort executor, step persistence, retry/backoff, circuit breakers, idempotency tokens

title: AI workflow engine — n8n integration
description: Import/export n8n JSON, run n8n flows inside orchestrator or delegate to managed n8n runtime

title: Local LLM runner integration
description: Ollama adapter, model management, embedding generation, usage tracking

title: Observability — structured logging
description: JSON structured logs, correlation IDs, log aggregation

title: Observability — metrics & dashboards
description: Grafana dashboards: revenue, orders, bot PnL, workflow success rate, API latency

title: Observability — alerting
description: Alert rules: trading loss limits, high error rate, payment failures; Slack/email notifications

title: AI guardrails — prompt firewall
description: Input scanning for injection patterns, blocklist, regex + classifier, logging

title: AI guardrails — output enforcement
description: JSON Schema validation on LLM outputs, confidence thresholds, deterministic options (temp=0)

title: Security hardening
description: OWASP mitigations, rate limiting, security headers, CSRF, input validation, dependency scanning

title: Portfolio / case studies page
description: Showcase completed work with screenshots, descriptions, tags; link from service pages

title: SEO optimization
description: Meta tags, Open Graph, sitemap.xml, structured data (JSON-LD), page speed optimization

title: Red-team testing execution
description: Run all 14 red-team test cases; document results; remediate findings

title: Stress testing
description: k6/Locust load tests on storefront, order flow, payment; chaos tests on bot infrastructure

title: End-to-end testing suite
description: Playwright E2E tests: registration, browse, order, pay, messaging, delivery, review

title: Documentation & operator runbooks
description: API docs, operator runbooks (incident response, trading loss), deployment guide

title: Launch checklist & go-live
description: Final security review, load test sign-off, DNS/SSL setup, Stripe production keys, monitoring verification
